series_metadata.series_description: All grant records concerning Federal grants to Plant Pest Control Division including grant application forms, financial status reports, expenditures, and employee hours tracked against the work plan.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Electronic: originals are scanned into PPC drive and will be retained electronically. ; Paper: original document will be scanned and paper copy will be retained document is verified readable in our PPC drive; once paper copy is verified readable it will be put in waste paper
